session_summary: v2.2 deployed, gold_2 populated with 14 JACC/NEJM/USPSTF docs. Discovered magic byte bug (magic[:3] vs magic[:4]) causing all real PDFs to read as raw binary. Fixed. Cal run 3: 14/14 processed, 12/14 correct routing (86%), 577 recs/420 thresh/220 meds. v2.3 fixes: RCT pre-screen heuristic, max_tokens 2000->3000, preamble stripping in llm_generate_json, screening window 3000->5000.

v2.0.notes: First working version. 3 engines, routing bug for diagnostic.

v2.1.notes: DiagnosticEngine, title metadata, chunking, per_document. Screener over-broad on diagnostic.

v2.2.notes: Screener tightened, RCT type+engine, ZIP bundle support, chunk params 25k/2.5k/12. Had magic byte bug magic[:3] vs [:4].

v2.3.notes: magic[:4] fix, RCT pre-screen heuristic (journal name + content keywords), max_tokens 2000->3000, preamble stripping before first {, screening window 3000->5000 chars.

results.issue: No DiagnosticEngine, no chunking, no title extraction

results.chunk_failure_cause: max_tokens=2000 truncation on complex population fields

magic_byte_bug.description: magic[:3] == b'%PDF' never matched — b'%PDF' is 4 bytes so %PD != %PDF. All PDFs fell through to _extract_text(), reading raw binary. Fixed to magic[:4].
magic_byte_bug.impact: 100% of binary PDFs returning garbage to screener and extractor

files_modified_v2.3: utils/prompt_builder.py -- llm_generate_json strips preamble before first { or [
utils/prompt_builder.py -- max_tokens default 2000 -> 3000 in llm_extract and llm_extract_chunked
core/screening.py       -- RCT pre-screen heuristic, screening window 3000->5000, rct in VALID_TYPES
next_steps: Full library ingest is cleared to proceed -- all 21 gold_list docs at quality 0.957
Full library available: afp-peds-uspstf (~50 docs), ID-renal-gi-hep (~60), neuro-tox-rheum-psych (~30), periop-dm2-vax (~15)
Run main.py (or a new run_full_library.py) pointing at each folder in sequence
v2.4 candidates: per-doc coverage % tracking, cross-guideline query interface, library-wide deduplication

calibration_v1_closed.scorer_bug: _nonempty used len > 5, rejecting valid single-char evidence codes like 'A', 'B'. Fixed to len >= 1.
calibration_v1_closed.prompt_fix: evidence_level codes expanded to descriptive strings, e.g. 'Grade A (RCT-supported)' instead of 'A'
